ConstructorArguments: Can we make a IReferenceTrack or BindingReference of the given type? Returns true if type is either GameObject, or derived from Component.

Documentation.Summary:
Can we make a <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.IReferenceTrack`1" /> or <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Properties.BindingReference`1" />
of the given <paramref name="type" />? Returns true if <paramref name="type" /> is
either <see cref="T:Sandbox.GameObject" />, or derived from <see cref="T:Sandbox.Component" />.

ConstructorArguments: If refType is a constructed BindingReference, gets the wrapped type. Otherwise, returns null.

Documentation.Summary:
If <paramref name="refType" /> is a constructed <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Properties.BindingReference`1" />,
gets the wrapped type. Otherwise, returns <see langword="null" />.

ConstructorArguments: Helper methods for working with BindingReference.

Documentation.Summary: Helper methods for working with <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Properties.BindingReference`1" />.

ConstructorArguments: Resolve this binding reference by looking up the current binding for BindingReference.TrackId.

Documentation.Summary: Resolve this binding reference by looking up the current binding for <see cref="P:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Properties.BindingReference`1.TrackId" />.

Params.binder: Binder to look up the current binding in.

Documentation.Summary: Track to look up the binding of during playback.

Used by movie property tracks with <see cref="T:Sandbox.GameObject" /> or <see cref="T:Sandbox.Component" /> value
types to reference other tracks. This value will be resolved to whatever the referenced track
is bound to during playback. Needed for properties like <see cref="P:Sandbox.SkinnedModelRenderer.BoneMergeTarget" />.

Params.TrackId: Track to look up the binding of during playback.

TypeParams.T: Either <see cref="T:Sandbox.GameObject" />, or a <see cref="T:Sandbox.Component" /> type.

ConstructorArguments: Helper to see if the renderer's model has a bone with the given name.

Documentation.Summary: Helper to see if the renderer's model has a bone with the given <paramref name="name" />.

ConstructorArguments: Gets the current movie-driven parent-space transform of the given bone. If the bone isn't controlled by a movie, just returns the current parent-space transform.

Gets the current movie-driven parent-space transform of the given bone. If the bone
isn't controlled by a movie, just returns the current parent-space transform.

ConstructorArguments: Sets the current movie-driven parent-space transform of the given bone.

ConstructorArguments: Pseudo-property on a SkinnedModelRenderer that has a sub-property for each bone. Stores movie-driven transforms for each bone during playback, and applies them when MovieBoneAnimatorSystem performs Sandbox.GameObjectSystem.Stage.UpdateBones.

Pseudo-property on a <see cref="T:Sandbox.SkinnedModelRenderer" /> that has a sub-property for each bone.
Stores movie-driven transforms for each bone during playback, and applies them when
<see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Properties.MovieBoneAnimatorSystem" /> performs <see cref="F:Sandbox.GameObjectSystem.Stage.UpdateBones" />.

ConstructorArguments: Applies any active movie-driven bone transformations.

ConstructorArguments: Clears all movie-driven bone transformations for the given renderer.

ConstructorArguments: Gets the current movie-driven parent-space transform for the given bone. If this bone isn't currently being controlled by a movie, returns its current transform.

Gets the current movie-driven parent-space transform for the given bone. If this

ConstructorArguments: Coordinates playing bone animations from MoviePlayers. Holds a BoneAccessor for SkinnedModelRenderers in the scene, which store any movie-controlled bone transforms.

Documentation.Summary:
Coordinates playing bone animations from <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.MoviePlayer" />s. Holds a <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Properties.BoneAccessor" />
for <see cref="T:Sandbox.SkinnedModelRenderer" />s in the scene, which store any movie-controlled bone transforms.

ConstructorArguments: Lists all available property names provided by this factory from a given parent.

Documentation.Summary: Lists all available property names provided by this factory from a given <paramref name="parent" />.

ConstructorArguments: Decides if this factory can create a property given a parent target and name. Returns any non-null type if this factory can create such a property, after which Sandbox.MovieMaker.Properties.ITrackPropertyFactory.CreateProperty``1(Sandbox.MovieMaker.ITrackTarget,System.String) will be called using that type.

Documentation.Summary:
Decides if this factory can create a property given a <paramref name="parent" /> target and <paramref name="name" />.
Returns any non-<see langword="null" /> type if this factory can create such a property, after which <see cref="M:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Properties.ITrackPropertyFactory.CreateProperty``1(Sandbox.MovieMaker.ITrackTarget,System.String)" />
will be called using that type.

ConstructorArguments: When listing properties to add, what category should we use for the given property provided by this factory?

Documentation.Summary: When listing properties to add, what category should we use for the given property provided by this factory?

ConstructorArguments: Create a property with the given parent, name, and property value type T. The target type was previously returned by ITrackPropertyFactory.GetTargetType(ITrackTarget,string), or read from a deserialized track.

Documentation.Summary:
Create a property with the given <paramref name="parent" />, <paramref name="name" />, and property value type <typeparamref name="T" />.
The target type was previously returned by <see cref="M:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Properties.ITrackPropertyFactory.GetTargetType(Sandbox.MovieMaker.ITrackTarget,System.String)" />, or read from a deserialized track.

ConstructorArguments: Used to sort the order that factories are considered when trying to create a property.

Documentation.Summary: Used to sort the order that factories are considered when trying to create a property.

Used by <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.TrackBinder" /> to create <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.ITrackProperty" /> instances that allow <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.ITrack" />s
to modify values in a scene.

An <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Properties.ITrackPropertyFactory" /> that only creates properties nested inside a particular <typeparamref name="TParent" />
target type.

TypeParams.TParent: Parent target type that this factory's properties are always nested inside.

ConstructorArguments: Returns true if this factory can create a property with the given parent and name.
Creates a property with the given parent and name.

Documentation.Summary:
An <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Properties.ITrackPropertyFactory" /> that only creates properties nested inside a particular <typeparamref name="TParent" />
target type, and that always have the same property value type <typeparamref name="TValue" />.

TypeParams.TParent: Parent target type that this factory's properties are always nested inside.
TypeParams.TValue: Property value type for properties created by this factory.

ConstructorArguments: Dummy type for ITrackPropertyFactory to return if it matches a track, but doesn't know what target type it maps to.

Dummy type for <see cref="T:Sandbox.MovieMaker.Properties.ITrackPropertyFactory`1" /> to return if it matches
